# VALIDATION CHECKLIST

## Build Validation

* Project builds successfully
* No warnings treated as errors violated

## Architecture Validation

* No layer violations
* Correct folder placement
* Correct dependency direction

## Database Validation

* FK valid
* Constraints valid
* Indexes valid
* Migrations generate successfully

## API Validation

* DTO mappings valid
* Validation present
* Status codes appropriate

## Frontend Validation

* No broken imports
* API integration matches backend contracts
